scripts: create service user searchstax-service-user
create path (sling:Folder) /conf/searchstaxconnector
create path (sling:Folder) /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings
create path (sling:Folder) /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/initialsetupconfig
create path (sling:Folder) /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/apiconfig
create path (sling:Folder) /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/emailconfig
create path (sling:Folder) /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/fullindexsetupconfig
create path (sling:Folder) /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/metadatafieldmapping
create path (sling:Folder) /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/languagemapping
create path (sling:Folder) /var/searchstaxconnector
create path (sling:Folder) /var/searchstaxconnector/fullindex
create path (sling:Folder) /var/searchstaxconnector/fullindex/failure

set ACL on /conf (ACLOptions=merge)
    allow jcr:read for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /conf/searchstaxconnector (ACLOptions=merge)
 allow jcr:read,rep:write for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings (ACLOptions=merge)
 allow jcr:read,rep:write for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/initialsetupconfig (ACLOptions=merge)
 allow jcr:read,rep:write for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/apiconfig (ACLOptions=merge)
 allow jcr:read,rep:write for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/emailconfig (ACLOptions=merge)
 allow jcr:read,rep:write for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/fullindexsetupconfig (ACLOptions=merge)
 allow jcr:read,rep:write for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/metadatafieldmapping (ACLOptions=merge)
 allow jcr:read,rep:write for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /conf/searchstaxconnector/settings/languagemapping (ACLOptions=merge)
 allow jcr:read,rep:write for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /var (ACLOptions=merge)
    allow jcr:read,jcr:addChildNodes,jcr:modifyProperties for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /var/searchstaxconnector (ACLOptions=merge)
    allow jcr:read,jcr:addChildNodes,jcr:modifyProperties,jcr:removeNode,jcr:removeChildNodes,jcr:nodeTypeManagement for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /var/searchstaxconnector/fullindex (ACLOptions=merge)
    allow jcr:read,jcr:addChildNodes,jcr:modifyProperties,jcr:removeNode,jcr:removeChildNodes,jcr:nodeTypeManagement for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /var/searchstaxconnector/fullindex/failure (ACLOptions=merge)
    allow jcr:read,jcr:addChildNodes,jcr:modifyProperties,jcr:removeNode,jcr:removeChildNodes,jcr:nodeTypeManagement for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /content (ACLOptions=merge)
    allow jcr:read for searchstax-service-user
end

set ACL on /content/dam (ACLOptions=merge)
    allow jcr:read for searchstax-service-user
end
